goal: Read through the Karaoke Hero project directory structure and look for inefficiencies or gaps in the codebase.

plan_steps.description: List all files in the Karaoke Hero project directory.
acceptance_criteria: A comprehensive list of all files in the Karaoke Hero project directory is generated.

plan_steps.description: Search for common inefficiencies or gaps in the codebase by analyzing file patterns and naming conventions.
acceptance_criteria: A report identifying potential inefficiencies or gaps based on file patterns and naming conventions is generated.

plan_steps.description: Review the identified inefficiencies or gaps in detail to assess their impact on the codebase.
acceptance_criteria: A detailed analysis of each identified inefficiency or gap, including its potential impact, is documented.

plan_steps.description: Propose solutions to address the identified inefficiencies or gaps in the codebase.
acceptance_criteria: A proposal document outlining potential solutions for each identified inefficiency or gap is created.

plan_steps.description: Prioritize the proposed solutions based on their impact and feasibility.
acceptance_criteria: A prioritized list of solutions, ranked by their potential impact and feasibility, is documented.

spoken_summary: I wasn't able to access the Karaoke Hero project directory — no tools ran, so either the path wasn't available or there was a permission issue. Want to give me the full path to the project so I can dive in and check for inefficiencies?
